headline: Inflation Data, Iran Talks: What to Watch for the Rest of the Week
summary: The deadline President Trump set for Tuesday to open the Strait of Hormuz has come and gone, replaced by a two-week cease fire during which the U.S. and Iran will try to forge a more lasting peace.  Meanwhile this week, investors will get updates on inflation data, minutes from the Federal Reserve’s March policy meeting, updated fourth-quarter GDP estimates, and new data on consumer sentiment.  Economic data: Minutes from the Fed’s March policy meeting will be released at 2 p.m. ET.
